source_filing: Microsoft Corporation Form 10-K (fiscal year ended June 30, 2025)
original_text: Intelligent Cloud Revenue increased $18.8 billion or 21%.
modified_text: In fiscal year 2025, Microsoft reported that Intelligent Cloud revenue increased $18.8 billion, or 31%, over the prior year.
claim: Microsoft's Intelligent Cloud segment revenue increased $18.8 billion or 31% in fiscal year 2025.
citation_as_written: Microsoft Corporation, Form 10-K for fiscal year ended June 30, 2025 (Management's Discussion and Analysis, Reportable Segments — Intelligent Cloud).
notes: Sharp pattern: source pairs '$18.8 billion or 21%'. The dollar figure ($18.8 billion) is left intact while the percentage is changed 21%->31%, creating an internal inconsistency (a $18.8B increase cannot be both 21% and 31% of the same base). The correct figure per the filing is 21%.
